question: What special abilities do the Gleepglorp and the Flumph from planet Xylar possess?

answers.original:
The Gleepglorp can manipulate Zylonic energy for teleportation, while the Flumph's abilities are not specified.

### References

- [1] Gleepglorp
- [2] Flumph
answers.perturbed:
The Gleepglorp can manipulate Zylonic energy for teleportation, while the Flumph originates from planet Xylar.

### References

- [1] Gleepglorp

entities.name: Planet Xylar
entities.description: Planet Xylar is the home of the Gleepglorp and the Flumph.

entities.name: Lumina System
entities.description: The Lumina System is a planetary system consisting of six planets orbiting the stable yellow dwarf known as Lumina Star.<SEP>The Lumina System is a planetary system containing multiple planets with varying conditions and unique life forms.

entities.name: Gleepglorp
entities.description: The Gleepglorp is a being from planet Xylar capable of manipulating Zylonic energy for teleportation.

entities.name: Unique Life Forms
entities.description: Unique Life Forms are diverse organisms discovered on multiple planets within the Lumina System, adapted to varying conditions.

entities.name: Etherean Soul-Compass
entities.description: The Etherean Soul-Compass is a device used by spirit guides to detect Life-Auras and navigate Astral-Currents.

entities.name: Life-Aura
entities.description: Life-Auras are colored emanations around living creatures that can be detected by the Soul-Compass.
